text:
The Gordeau Desert (, Gorudō Sabaku) is located in the outskirts of Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 75 

Overview

The Gordeau Desert is a large, dry wasteland where half of the Phantom Troupe members were stranded and Uvogin fought against members of the Mafia Community Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 77 and several members of the Shadow Beasts. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 78 He would later fight Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 81 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 82 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 83 and be killed by Kurapika here. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 84 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

After arriving at Lingon Airport, Neon and her bodyguards make their way by car across the desert toward Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 71 

After their first attack on the Mafia's Underground Auction, several Phantom Troupe members make their escape in a hot-air balloon and are shot down in the desert. Uvogin slaughters the pursuers, including four of the Shadow Beasts. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 76 After Kurapika captures Uvogin, Shizuku, Machi, Shalnark, Feitan, Nobunaga, and Franklin chase after him, but are stopped by the remaining Shadow Beasts. After Nobunaga is captured by Owl, the Troupe members eliminate the remaining Shadow Beasts and take Owl as their prisoner. 

The next evening, Kurapika kills Uvogin in a duel and buries him in the desert.
